summary: Comprehensive backend (12 pytest cases) + frontend (Playwright) testing of Facciamo Ape?. All 12 backend tests PASS and all critical UI flows (landing/waitlist, explore demo grid, profile->first message, chat gating, chat list 'in attesa') work end-to-end.

issues: The bottom-nav 'Chat' label is partially clipped by the 'Made with Emergent' badge on mobile width (390px). Consider increasing bottom padding on the nav or hiding the Emergent badge on mobile.

action_items: Optional: avoid Emergent badge overlapping bottom nav 'Chat' label on mobile.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth helper accepts both cookie AND Bearer header — good. Conversation gating correctly enforced in BOTH POST /api/conversations and POST /api/conversations/{id}/messages.
Aperitivi counter increments on both sides exactly once on accept (via either explicit /accept or auto-accept on first reply) — verified.
add_participant lower-cases input username; ensure seeded usernames are also stored lower-cased (the auth_session endpoint already normalizes — OK).
GET /api/files/{path} is intentionally unauthenticated for ; acceptable per design note but consider signed URLs if storage paths are guessable.
WebSocket endpoint exists but frontend uses 4s polling — acceptable per agent-to-agent note. Consider connecting via WS token URL once auth strategy supports it.
Single-file server.py is ~670 lines; close to the 700-line guideline. Plan to split into routers (auth, users, conversations, storage) before further growth.
test_credentials: Created test sessions directly in MongoDB via mongosh per /app/auth_testing.md. Tokens are prefixed test_session_ and users with user_id prefix test-user-/test-ui- (cleaned up in teardown).
seed_data_creation: Used pre-seeded demo users (giulia_b, marco_r, sofia_e, lorenzo_c, chiara_m, etc.) created automatically by backend startup hook.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reusable pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — covers health, waitlist, auth gating, profile update, nearby+demo presence, single user with distance, conversation create+first-message gating (both endpoints), demo reply auto-accept + aperitivi_count increment, accept-own-conv forbidden, add_participant -> is_group=True with 3 participants, block filtering + reverse-block 403, upload+download. Frontend Playwright flow used mongosh-created session cookie on domain happy-hour-crew.preview.emergentagent.com.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in the requested flows.
